execution.termination: SIGTERM requested by user after the run made no persisted progress for more than three hours

interpretation.allowed_claim: R3 passed its static preflight but was stopped before the all-or-nothing real-policy binding probe completed. It produced no attacked-plus-defended episode or efficacy outcome.
forbidden_claims: The R3 action-envelope defense passed or failed an efficacy gate
Any partially completed in-memory binding probe is a retained result
The stopped R3 root may be resumed or overwritten
The resource failure establishes or refutes general defense efficacy

priority_decision.user_authorization: 2026-07-23: user designated this attacked-plus-defended action-envelope experiment as the current work priority and authorized a rerun after resources are stable
priority_decision.next_step: Prepare a resource-isolated successor protocol and fresh absent root. Execute only after two distinct physical GPUs remain below 4096 MiB with no compute process and the observed JAX/EGL device mapping matches the frozen roles.
